title: Be the Top Dog on Hyperliquid $HYPE
summary_title: TopDog: Building a multiplayer trading terminal on Hyperliquid
summary_description: Tyron explains how TopDog turns copy trading into social signal discovery, with guilds, cashback rewards, and plans for meme coin trenching.

key_moments.label: Celebrating Hyperliquid all-time high and introducing the builder
Origin story: from failed copy trading to wallet footprint signals
TopDog product explained: multiplayer real-time trading app with whale footprints
Why Telegram mini-app: zero friction onboarding, one-click access, simple UX
Revenue model via builder code and cashback rewards from trading volume
Guild wars launch next week with respect points program and competitive leaderboards
Future roadmap: desktop pro version and trenching mode for Hyper EVM meme coins
Public beta rollout within a month after guild evaluation period
